name: BabyPips
description_short: The world's most popular free forex education platform, offering the structured School of Pipsology curriculum, trading tools, and an active community for beginners.
description_long:
BabyPips is widely regarded as the definitive starting point for aspiring forex traders. Founded in 2005, its flagship offering — the School of Pipsology — is a completely free, structured curriculum that takes beginners from absolute zero through advanced trading concepts. The course uses a casual, humorous writing style with levels named Preschool through Graduation, making dense financial concepts accessible and engaging without requiring any paid subscription or upsell.

Beyond the core course, BabyPips offers a suite of free tools including Forexpedia (a comprehensive trading glossary), pip value and position size calculators, a pivot point calculator, a currency converter, and a live economic calendar. The MarketMilk visual analysis tool provides currency strength meters, volatility charts, correlation tables, and heat maps covering forex and crypto pairs, making it a genuinely useful resource even for experienced traders.

BabyPips Premium extends the platform for active traders who want actionable short-term trading strategies across FX, equity indices, gold, oil, and crypto. Premium subscribers receive high-impact event trading guides, weekly macro reviews, full MarketMilk access, and an ad-free experience. The free tier, however, is so comprehensive that many traders use BabyPips for years without ever needing a paid plan.

The platform's large, active forums are a standout feature, providing a community where traders at all levels can discuss strategies, broker experiences, and market conditions. While BabyPips excels as a beginner and intermediate resource, more advanced traders may find the depth of technical content limited compared to dedicated paid courses or mentorship programs.

tiers.name: Premium
features: FX, indices, gold, oil, and crypto setups

pros: Entire structured forex curriculum is 100% free with no paywalls or upsells
School of Pipsology is the gold standard beginner-friendly forex course
MarketMilk provides genuinely useful visual analysis tools at no cost
Large, active community forums for peer learning and strategy discussion
Comprehensive free tools including calculators, glossary, and economic calendar
cons: Advanced and intermediate content lacks depth for experienced traders
Primarily text-based with no video lectures, simulations, or interactive exercises
No formal mentorship, trade journaling, or performance tracking features
Premium pricing not transparently listed on main site
